title: PvP zone
description: PvP Zone lets you create custom arenas! Set your own rating rewards and leader effects. Players get a kit, earn points, buy buffs, and duel others. Easy setup, smooth PvP вАФ build your zone and dominate!
body:
# вЪФпЄП PvP Zone вАФ Plugin for PvP Arenas with Rating & Duels

**Version:** 1.0.0  
**Core:** Paper 1.21+  
**Java:** 17+  
**Languages:** English рЯЗЇрЯЗЄ | –†—Г—Б—Б–Ї–Є–є рЯЗЈрЯЗЇ

---

## рЯУЛ Description

**PvP Zone** is a plugin for Paper 1.21+ servers that adds PvP zones with a rating system, duels, and a bonus shop. Inside zones, players receive a pre-defined kit, and their inventory is restored upon exiting. The plugin supports **two languages**: English and Russian.

| Feature | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| рЯУК **Rating System** | Earn points for kills and duel victories |
| рЯЫТ **Bonus Shop** | Spend points on temporary buffs |
| рЯФ• **Leader Effect** | The top-rated player leaves fiery footsteps |
| рЯМН **Bilingual** | Switch between English and Russian in config |

---

## рЯУ¶ Installation

| Step | Action |
|------|--------|
| 1 | рЯЦ•пЄП Install **Paper** (or compatible fork) for Minecraft 1.21+ |
| 2 | рЯУ• Download the latest **PvP Zone** from Modrinth |
| 3 | рЯУВ Place the JAR file into your server's `plugins` folder |
| 4 | рЯФД Restart your server |
| 5 | вЪЩпЄП In `plugins/PvpZone/config.yml`, set your language: `language: "en"` or `language: "ru"` |

---

## рЯЫ†пЄП Initial Setup (Admin)

### 1пЄПвГ£ Creating a PvP Zone

| Step | Command | Description |
|------|---------|-------------|
| 1 | `/pvpz1` | Set first corner of the zone |
| 2 | `/pvpz2` | Set second corner (diagonally opposite) |
| 3 | `/pvpzone create <name>` | Create the zone (e.g., `/pvpzone create arena`) |

вЬЕ The zone is now saved. By default, it's linked to the kit named `default`.

---

### 2пЄПвГ£ Creating & Assigning Kits to Zones

You have **two convenient options**:

#### рЯФµ Option A: One Global Kit for All Zones (Simpler)

1. рЯІ∞ Fill your inventory with the items and armor you want (sword, armor, food, etc.)
2. рЯТЊ Run: `/pvpkit`
   - Your current inventory is saved as the **default** kit (`plugins/PvpZone/kit.yml`)
3. рЯМН All zones automatically use the `default` kit
4. If you created your zone **before** saving the kit, make sure it's assigned: `/pvpzone kit set arena default` (replace `arena` with your zone name)

#### рЯЯҐ Option B: Different Kits for Different Zones

1. рЯЧЇпЄП Create a zone (as in step 1), e.g.: `/pvpzone create arena`
2. рЯОТ Fill your inventory with items for this specific zone
3. рЯТЊ Save the kit and assign it to the zone in one command: `/pvpzone kit save arena my_kit` вАФ saves your inventory as `my_kit` and assigns it to zone `arena` Or simply: `/pvpzone kit save arena` вАФ saves inventory under the zone's current kit name (default) and assigns it

#### рЯФІ Managing Kit Assignments

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/pvpzone kit set <zone> <kit_name>` | Assign an existing kit to a zone |
| `/pvpzone kit save <zone> [kit_name]` | Save inventory as a kit and assign to zone |
| `/pvpzone kit info <zone>` | Show which kit is assigned to a zone |

рЯУБ **Kits are stored in:**  
- `plugins/PvpZone/kit.yml` (default kit)  
- `plugins/PvpZone/kits/<name>.yml` (custom kits)

---

### 3пЄПвГ£ Additional Zone Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/pvpzone list` | List all zones |
| `/pvpzone info <name>` | Zone information (size, world, kit, bonuses) |
| `/pvpzone bonuses <name> on\|off` | Enable/disable bonuses in zone |
| `/pvpzone reload` | Reload config, zones, and language settings |

---

## рЯМР Language Support (English / Russian)

In `config.yml`, at the very top: `language: "en"` # English or `language: "ru"` # Russian (default). After changing, run `/pvpzone reload` or restart the server.

рЯУБ **Translation files:** `plugins/PvpZone/lang/en.yml` and `plugins/PvpZone/lang/ru.yml`. You can edit these files to customize messages!

---

## рЯУЭ Complete Command List

| Command | Description | Permission |
|---------|-------------|------------|
| `/pvpz1` | Set first zone point | `pvpzone.admin` |
| `/pvpz2` | Set second zone point | `pvpzone.admin` |
| `/pvpkit <name>` | saves the current inventory as a kit with the specified name.| `pvpzone.admin` |
| `/pvpzone list` | List all zones | вАФ |
| `/pvpzone create <name>` | Create a zone from points | `pvpzone.admin` |
| `/pvpzone delete <name>` | Delete a zone | `pvpzone.admin` |
| `/pvpzone info <name>` | Zone information (including kit) | вАФ |
| `/pvpsetkit <zone> <kit>` | assigns the selected kit to the specified zone.| `pvpzone.admin` 
| `/pvpzone kit info <zone>` | Show which kit a zone uses | `pvpzone.admin` |
| `/pvpzone bonuses <zone> on\|off` | Toggle bonuses in zone | `pvpzone.admin` |
| `/pvpzone reload` | Reload plugin and language | `pvpzone.admin` |
| `/pvptop [page]` | Top players by rating | вАФ |
| `/pvpshop` | Open bonus shop | `pvpzone.shop` |
| `/pvp <player> [zone]` | Challenge a player to a duel | вАФ |
| `/pvpaccept` | Accept a duel request | вАФ |
| `/pvpdeny` | Decline a duel request | вАФ |
| `/pvpfix` | Reset PvP state and restore inventory | вАФ |
| `/pvpeffect` | Toggle leader effect (fiery footsteps) | вАФ |

---

## рЯФС Permissions

| Permission | Description |
|------------|-------------|
| `pvpzone.use` | Use PvP zones (default: everyone) |
| `pvpzone.shop` | Access `/pvpshop` (default: everyone) |
| `pvpzone.admin` | Admin: create zones, kits, set points, reload (default: OP) |
| `pvpzone.*` | All plugin permissions |

---

## рЯОЃ How to Play (For Players)

| Action | Command/Description |
|--------|---------------------|
| рЯЪ™ **Enter a PvP zone** | Kit auto-equipped, your inventory saved and restored on exit |
| вЪФпЄП **Kill enemies in zone** | Earn rating and shop points |
| рЯ§Ї **Challenge someone** | `/pvp <nickname>` or `/pvp <nickname> <zone>` |
| вЬЕ **Accept duel** | `/pvpaccept` |
| вЭМ **Decline duel** | `/pvpdeny` |
| рЯЫТ **Spend points** | `/pvpshop` вАФ buy health, speed, jump, damage buffs |
| рЯУК **Check leaderboard** | `/pvptop` |
| рЯФ• **Disable leader effect** | `/pvpeffect` (if you're #1 and don't want fiery footsteps) |

---

## вЬЕ Quick Checklist: Zone + Kit Setup

`1пЄПвГ£ /pvpz1` (first corner) `2пЄПвГ£ /pvpz2` (second corner) `3пЄПвГ£ /pvpzone create arena` (create zone) `4пЄПвГ£` Fill your inventory with desired items `5пЄПвГ£ /pvpkit` (save as default kit) OR `/pvpzone kit save arena my_kit` (save custom kit for arena) `6пЄПвГ£` If needed: `/pvpzone kit set arena default` (assign kit)

рЯОЙ **Done!** When players enter the zone, they'll automatically receive the assigned kit.

---

## рЯУБ Plugin Files

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `config.yml` | Main configuration (language, zones, bonuses) |
| `lang/en.yml` | English translations |
| `lang/ru.yml` | Russian translations |
| `kit.yml` | Default kit storage |
| `kits/` | Custom kits folder |
| `leader_effect_disabled.yml` | Players who disabled leader effect |
| `pvpzone.db` | SQLite database (players, rating, points, bonuses) |

---

## вЭУ FAQ

**вЭУ Q: How do I switch between English and Russian?**  
вЬЕ A: In `config.yml`, set `language: "en"` or `language: "ru"`, then run `/pvpzone reload`.

**вЭУ Q: Can I edit the translation texts?**  
вЬЕ A: Yes! Edit `lang/en.yml` or `lang/ru.yml` directly.

**вЭУ Q: How to add multiple zones with different kits?**  
вЬЕ A: Create zones with `/pvpzone create <name>` and assign kits with `/pvpzone kit set <zone> <kit_name>`.

**вЭУ Q: Duel won't start?**  
вЬЕ A: Check that you specified an existing zone (or that at least one zone exists). Both players must be online and not in another duel.

---

## рЯУМ Requirements

- рЯЦ•пЄП **Server:** Paper (or compatible API) 1.21+
- вШХ **Java:** 17+
- рЯУЪ **Dependencies** (included in JAR): SQLite JDBC, BungeeCord Chat, Gson

---

## рЯТЦ Support

Found a bug? Have a suggestion? Leave a comment on Modrinth or open an issue on our GitHub!

---

**вЪФпЄП PvP Zone вАФ Fight, Earn, Upgrade!** *English рЯЗЇрЯЗЄ | –†—Г—Б—Б–Ї–Є–є рЯЗЈрЯЗЇ*
